title: test/e2e: fix ncat tests
body:
These tests are flaking for unknown reasons. One problem could be ncat did not bound the port before we connect to it. Simple fix do not use ncat and just use the golang API to listen on the port without the extra ncat process. This should be race free in theory. Also do not run the nc container in the background, we want to see the errors from the ncat process in the container.

And because both tests do the same thing deduplicate them into one that just uses a loop to create both tests.

Fixes #23263
